title: hero-mmt-kit session state
description: Observable workflow pointer for resuming work across sessions. Hero skills update this at checkpoints; doctor reads it. Authoritative state lives in ACTIVE_STATE.md and artifact files under docs/ — this file is a derived convenience pointer.

currentSkill.description: Name of the hero-* skill currently in progress

lastCheckpoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last session write

resumePath.description: Path to the artifact/report to resume from

nextAction.description: First concrete action for continuing the work

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update
